# Braces

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Braces icon">

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Braces;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Braces { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
json, code, token, curly brackets, data, {, }

## Categories
development, files
